data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security by requiring a second form of identification.
data.technical_spec: Optional PIN during sign-in to prevent unauthorized access.

data.title: Automatic Security Updates
data.description: Regular updates to patch vulnerabilities and add security enhancements.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management system powered by cloud-update services.

data.title: Spam and Abuse Detection
data.description: Mechanisms to detect and block spam activities and account abuses.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models analyzing user behavior patterns for anomalies.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: Ensures that data stored on servers remain secure from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Uses AES-256 encryption for data stored within WhatsApp's servers.

data.title: User Privacy Settings
data.description: Comprehensive privacy settings giving users control over visibility
data.technical_spec: Granular privacy options for profile visibility and contact permissions.
